sections.paragraph:
Εὐβούλα, ας (so also IGLSyria 931, otherwise Εὐβούλη [s. WRoscher I 1396 and Aa I 63, 2 al.] as Sb 8954 [Ptolemaic]) Eubula, wife of the freedman Diophantos (s. Διόφαντος) AcPl Ha 2, 13; 17; 35; 3, 3; 11; 4, 15; 5, 19.

IGLSyria IGLSyria = Inscriptions grecques et latines de la Syrie—List 3

Aa Aa = Acta apostolorum apocrypha—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

AcPl AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 403
